items.briefing:
A new OAIC survey highlights that Australians are increasingly concerned about how their personal data is being used, with trust in AI remaining low. People want more transparency and fairer use of their information — a sentiment that training organisations should take seriously when handling student and staff data.

With data breach risks growing, now is a good time to review your organisation's response plan. If a breach occurs, acting quickly and notifying affected individuals promptly is both a legal obligation and a trust issue.

**Practical tip:** Check that your organisation has a documented data breach response plan and that key staff know their role in it.

featured.title: Australians demand fairer data use as AI trust sinks
featured.quote: Australians rejecting AI data use signals urgent need for compliance and trust rebuilding.
